channel.title: Soft Engineer Exam Prep on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Soft Engineer Exam Prep on yexca'Blog

item.title: Software Designer - Operating System Notes
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash

These notes were likely written around the same time as previous ones. Since the file creation time is past the exam date, it might have been created during a file move.

The Role of Operating Systems

A computer system consists of two parts: hardware and software. A computer without any software is often called “bare metal.” Using bare metal directly is not only inconvenient but also significantly reduces work efficiency and machine utilization. The Operating System (OS) aims to bridge the gap between humans and machines, creating an interface between the user and the computer. It’s a type of system software configured for bare metal.
